MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jan-18-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. JESSICA DEWITT, Esq. of Brady Law Group (Tel: 415-459-7300) as movant/counsel-of-record for plaintiff Leslie Black;
No other appearances made in this case.

HEARING ON MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO PLAINTIFF LESLIE BLACK.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed the parties to appear.

Counsel for plaintiff informs the Court that this case has settled, and requests that this matter be taken off calendar.

The Court rules as follows: Matter is off calendar at the request of the movant.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Dec-01-2022 Continued To Jan-18-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Nov-07-2022 Continued To Dec-05-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. JESSICA DEWITT, Esq. of the Brady Law Group (Tel: 415-459-7300) for movant;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO PLAINTIFF LESLIE BLACK.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed parties to appear.

The Court instructs Ms. DeWitt to call the court's chambers number at 10:15 a.m.

After conducting the conference call with Ms. DeWitt, the Court continues the hearing on this matter to December 5, 2022 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
